[2020-05-16 07:47] awaclus: Zera is definitely underrating it by a mile
[2020-05-16 07:48] awaclus: also wtf is Amporilla doing being the best attacker
[2020-05-16 07:49] amalloy: it's the only attacker that attacks for 10 every turn. QED
[2020-05-16 07:49] anesotericman (Esoteric): ampo could be anywhere from S to F, depending on your metrics. Even on mine looking mostly at "real" attackers, it's pretty randomly a mix of powerlevel, effect on strategy, effect on actual game, efficiency of first purchase, efficiency of average purchase...
[2020-05-16 07:50] awaclus: Amporilla has a ridiculously high efficiency of average purchase
[2020-05-16 07:51] awaclus: but that's not a very good metric because obviously you don't buy it at all 90-93% of the time
[2020-05-16 07:51] anesotericman (Esoteric): yeah, F is probably lowballing it a good bit, but my general point stands.
[2020-05-16 07:51] awaclus: Nitrocybe also has a high efficiency of average purchase, because you only buy it when you'd float gold and waste red
[2020-05-16 07:52] micerang: I feel like the most useful metric should be how likely you're going to want to build toward said unit
[2020-05-16 07:52] anesotericman (Esoteric): you can add "opportunity cost evaluation" on to the list of different ways you can judge things. End of the day, all the list are just "how much you like the unit"
[2020-05-16 07:53] anesotericman (Esoteric): the trick there is that "want to" is very subjective
[2020-05-16 07:54] anesotericman (Esoteric): Do I want shadowfangs? Sure! Do I try to get them? Not often. So do I really want them?
[2020-05-16 07:54] Deleted User (Deleted User): it seems the best metric is what i used
[2020-05-16 07:54] Deleted User (Deleted User): how much do u want exclusive access to the card
[2020-05-16 07:54] micerang: well, the goal is to win, so "want to" should be objective
[2020-05-16 07:55] Deleted User (Deleted User): here is one of  the best lists, before shit like the odin change https://www.reddit.com/r/Prismata/comments/887lcg/prepatch_ranked_tier_list_of_units/
r/Prismata - Pre-Patch Ranked Tier list of Units
8 votes and 12 comments so far on Reddit
[2020-05-16 07:56] micerang: So if I put Tia thurnax in A tier or whatever, it's because if I see it in a set, I probably want to prepare to get it, and having a rough idea of how good units are compared to others helps if I don't know enough to do an analysis of all 8 units (or if I don't feel like it)
[2020-05-16 07:57] anesotericman (Esoteric): the exclusive access metric seems pretty reasonable, then. Basically a heads-up of what to watch out for.
[2020-05-16 07:58] anesotericman (Esoteric): Alternatively, a "raw efficiency" metric might be worthwhile, then you need to do the step of "can people buy it THIS GAME" instead of trying to precalculate how often people can buy it and work that into metrics
[2020-05-16 08:01] anesotericman (Esoteric): although I have no idea why people like doomed mech so much
[2020-05-16 08:01] Deleted User (Deleted User): i imagine it's still 9bb ls 5
[2020-05-16 08:03] anesotericman (Esoteric): you often get abused hard, you usually don't want BB, it's inefficient compared to things like chieftain or bull... I mean, it's not terrible, don't get me wrong
[2020-05-16 08:04] anesotericman (Esoteric): it's a wannabe rectifier, worse in almost every way
[2020-05-16 08:04] Deleted User (Deleted User): i'm p sure it's significantly better than rectifier
[2020-05-16 08:04] anesotericman (Esoteric): I haven't found that to be the case, is all I can really say at the end of the day
[2020-05-16 08:06] megasupp (mega-supp): I would say doomed is better if there is no good soak
[2020-05-16 08:08] anesotericman (Esoteric): there's definitely situations it's good. Sets where you want BB but don't have good soak are...rare. In my experience.
[2020-05-16 08:09] anesotericman (Esoteric): or ones where you know the attack is useful and won't get abused on the backend
[2020-05-16 08:09] anesotericman (Esoteric): going versus venge or something. that's good
[2020-05-16 08:09] anesotericman (Esoteric): prebuilt defense is great there
[2020-05-16 08:09] megasupp (mega-supp): thing is single forge is pretty awkward if you don't want to buy walls
[2020-05-16 08:11] anesotericman (Esoteric): I generally just try to go slightly faster if at all possible, I guess? That's the best way to avoid those awkward single blastforge but don't want a wall lines
[2020-05-16 08:11] anesotericman (Esoteric): wait to get the blast until you're going to want walls
[2020-05-16 08:11] anesotericman (Esoteric): obviously a big generalization
